name: Henry Glover
description: American songwriter, arranger, record producer and trumpet player (1921-1991)
abstract: Henry Bernard Glover (May 21, 1921 – April 7, 1991) was an American songwriter, arranger, record producer and trumpet player. In the music industry of the time, Glover was one of the most successful and influential black executives.

works_created.t: I Love You, Yes I Do

about_quotes.speaker: Teddy McRae
about_quotes.evidence: I had Glover on trumpet, you know -- a lot of stars in there... We stayed there a whole year.

about_quotes.speaker: Art Farmer
about_quotes.evidence: I just saw him around sometimes. “Hello Mr. Glover” and “How are you?” That was it.
about_quotes.doc_title: Art Farmer — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
